{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323040515923C3387FA15D01F1A9A"}"},"total":455},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7446679650641789721","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这书确实不错，作者加油奥利给[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733820932,"group_id":"7438174361820875838","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2pmBgW4sWpKmSVm8X8eY5w=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"110563807128","user_name":"爱吃家常酱牛肉的东篱"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110563807128","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1699530091,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7438174361820875838","book_info":{"abstract":"作者小号，同类型同题材，不同故事小说正在推荐，欢迎大佬前去阅读，新书书名《宗门禁闭十年，出山陆地神仙》
本书短剧《开局召唤回京，签到陆地神仙》正在番茄、红果等热播，欢迎大佬前去观看！
【开局无敌+战力天花板+杀伐果断+不圣母】
陈长安穿越异界大乾皇朝九皇子，但因母族功高震主被贬受到牵连，发配荒凉的北凉，封为北凉王！
陈长安凭借前世的记忆，却将荒凉的北凉打造成沃野千里兵强马壮之地，更是成了大乾有名的稻米之乡，名传天下。
然而，一道皇帝病重的圣旨，将陈长安召回京城，再次卷入这皇位之争。
原本以为将是一场龙争虎斗你死我活九子夺嫡之局，觉醒神级打卡系统。
【叮！宿主在北凉打卡成功，奖励宿主陆地神仙修为！】
【叮！宿主在神象宗打卡成功，奖励宿主神象镇狱劲！】
【叮！宿主在剑阁打卡成功，奖励宿主混沌剑体！】
......
陈长安看着大乾皇帝和众皇子，嘴角上扬。
“你们眼中的皇位，在我眼里，垃圾都不算！”
“你是天人修为？不好意思！我比你高十个境界！”
“你想要跟我打？抱歉！你连对我出手的资格都没有！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1b0b17b13a14436f445d7c805c4a1261","author":"无敌小床","author_id":"","book_id":"7438174361820875838","book_name":"开局九龙夺嫡，签到陆地神仙","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7438174508051071550","read_count":"20669","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1336568"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"638","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,无敌,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a25b0fa53366a59f77ae5c3efc5b8ce0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393915&x-signature=1JCUtXa1wMJIgyjcfDqH603xPkg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2115932075332046","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"55"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323040515923C3387FA15D01F1A9A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读43分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_
